---
reference: inspect_ai.scorer
description: Task scoring and metrics.
---

## Scorers

### match
### includes
### pattern
### answer
### choice
### math
### f1
### exact
### model_graded_qa
### model_graded_fact
### perplexity
### target_perplexity
### multi_scorer

## Metrics

### accuracy
### mean
### std
### stderr
### bootstrap_stderr
### perplexity_per_token
### perplexity_per_seq

## Reducers

### at_least
### pass_at
### max_score
### mean_score
### median_score
### mode_score

## Types

### Scorer
### Target
### Score
### Value
### ScoreReducer
### Metric
### MetricProtocol
### SampleScore

## Decorators

### scorer
### metric
### score_reducer

## Intermediate Scoring

### score
